idea_title: Monte Carlo Dropout for Uncertainty-Aware Pseudo-Labeling

selected_idea.title: Monte Carlo Dropout for Uncertainty-Aware Pseudo-Labeling
selected_idea.pitch: EV003 lacks detailed uncertainty estimation methods. We implement Monte Carlo dropout for better uncertainty quantification.
selected_idea.mechanism: Apply Monte Carlo dropout with 30 forward passes to estimate predictive uncertainty before pseudo-label selection.
selected_idea.testable_hypothesis: If we use Monte Carlo dropout, Brier score will decrease by 18% compared to baseline Pseudo-D on digits dataset.

label: Micro-Probe
hypothesis: If we use Monte Carlo dropout, Brier score will decrease by 18% compared to baseline Pseudo-D on digits dataset.
method: Apply Monte Carlo dropout with 30 forward passes to estimate predictive uncertainty before pseudo-label selection.
expected_result: The proposed method (Monte Carlo Dropout for Uncertainty-Aware Pseudo-Labeling) should beat the baseline on the specified metric.
failure_interpretation: A weak or negative margin means the mechanism does not justify promotion and should be revised or killed.
